data.content: Approved implementation review: scripts/install.sh removes the launcher prompt command, prompt helper functions, AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md mutation flow, and prompt-related help/tips; scripts/setup.sh removes prompt template resolution and the prompt-guidance wizard so setup no longer mutates prompt files. Acceptance criteria match the committed diff. Read-only validation: bash -n passed for both scripts; bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test (2018 passed), and bun run build passed. bun run lint in this checkout reported unrelated generated files under .claude/worktrees/.../.next rather than issues in the reviewed change.
